markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and strategize content management system (CMS) access and integration between Rapyd and growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rapyd's WordPress site requires special security measures for access, initially proposing a custom browser setup](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [An API-based solution for bulk content uploads emerged as a preferred alternative to individual access](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to explore automated content transfer options to streamline the process and maintain security](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

## Topics

### Rapyd's Current CMS Access Protocol

  - [Rapyd uses a proprietary browser system with VPN for WordPress access](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [IT team in Tel Aviv configures custom browsers on specific machines](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Access is locked to the configured machine, not user accounts](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Initial proposal: Set up growthx.ai team member (Ada) with this custom access](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

### Exploring Alternative Content Transfer Methods

  - [Kirkland suggested using WordPress API or plugins for bulk uploads](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Potential formats: JSON or CSV files containing article content and metadata](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Mark to investigate WordPress REST API, plugins, or hosting provider (Pantheon) options](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Goal: Create a streamlined process where growthx.ai can "click a button and send everything over"](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### Technical Considerations for API Integration

  - [Need to determine exact format and fields required for content transfer](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Possibility of setting up a Rapyd-hosted API endpoint for growthx.ai to send content to](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [growthx.ai can potentially use AirOps to automate content sending to the API endpoint](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Content would be imported as drafts for Rapyd team review](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

### Security and Access Management

  - [Custom browser setup remains as a "Plan B" if API integration isn't feasible](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [API solution preferred to avoid adding new users to Rapyd's approved list](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Reduces dependency on individual team member availability for content uploads](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to discuss API/plugin options with Rapyd's development team](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Rapyd to provide sample export of 5 blog posts to clarify required fields and format](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Investigate setting up a Rapyd-hosted API endpoint for content transfer](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [growthx.ai to consult with IT (Yousa) about any potential security considerations](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Both parties to reconvene once more information is gathered on technical feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/J-EfFZ2WDuJLRK-yseq4yi2v6t3U4szx?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
